since_last: 33% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads -0.03%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 33% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.27% · BTC -4.70% · Gold -3.16% · Nasdaq100 -0.75%. 33% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at -0.03%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.03%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -2.25%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at -7.14%
cards.body: Leaders: UPST +3.81%, ZBRA +3.73%, WDAY +3.23%, PUBM +2.87%, PATH +2.72%. Laggards: SMR -7.14%, OKLO -6.70%, OKLO -6.70%, BBAI -6.50%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.16% at $156.36
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.16% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
